notes:
I've designed the cloud operations landing page you requested. I've focused on that high-fidelity, IBM-inspired aesthetic—a rigid 12-column grid, restrained monochrome surfaces, and that single precise cobalt accent. 

The design includes:
- A technical Top Navigation Bar with a search bar and operational status.
- A dense Side Navigation Bar for core operational categories.
- A data-rich dashboard with status modules for CPU load, memory commit, and global request latency.
- High-fidelity visualizations of network meshes and resource allocation.
- A technical footer for legal and compliance.

The overall feel is stable, operational, and highly precise.
prompt: Design an IBM-inspired cloud operations landing page with a rigid enterprise grid, data-rich status modules, precise labels, restrained monochrome surfaces, and one exact cobalt accent. It should feel operational, stable, and technical.
suggestions: Add an 'Alerts' sidebar on the right
Change the cobalt accent to a deep charcoal
title: Cloud Operations: Main Dashboard
